video.title: Huge Day Of Non-Stop Exciting Racing! | Giro D'Italia 2022 Stage 7 Highlights

transcript.clean_text: there was a murky cloudy atmosphere around the start of stage seven of the jedi italia a sign of things to come after a simple day on day six one in the sprint by almond dimer a second successive victory for the frenchman with juanpe lopez keeping the pink jersey the big question would be how would he fare on stage seven a trip from diante to potenza leaving calabria and heading up to basilicata with machiavonne pool and company signing in ready for action quick step alpha vinyl turned up minus mikhail marco who is a non-starter because of a fever the stage would be almost 200 kilometers long and contain well over 4 000 meters of climbing more meters of climbing on this supposed medium mountain stage than many at the high mountain days in the final week still to come four categorized climbs but up and down all day only the first 10 kilometers of the stage really with any flat the first visit to potenza for 21 years who would succeed danilo hondo a stage winner the fight for the break was an almighty one thomas again put in the first attack he'd be caught after around 15 kilometers however and the fight would go on and on under the first classified clan the passover with what paul's the former winner of liege bastognoliej out there at the front he taking the mountains points on the third cat chasing at the bottom of the descent alongside matcha fonda paul would be none other than richard canapas everything would come back together again but the attacks would continue as well second place leonard kendall trying to get up the road and force the pressure onto the maya rosa lopez responded well however formolo villella and the rest coming across soon form the break tom dumoulin would get there with diego camargo falcon molymer would be in the chase and with four riders already at the front a group of seven would eventually form the pink jersey would say that would be that for now giulio chicorni having time to serve as a mechanical out in the breakaway they were fighting it out amongst the seven for the king of the mountains points the first category climbed to montesserino taken by kuhn balman with a gap at five and a half minutes baumann was soon the virtual maya rosa that started to descend however luckily for david villella he didn't descend down the hill in your screened grenadiers brought the time back into a manageable one they weren't too interested in chasing down the group but no change of pink jersey was on the cards camargo would be dropped villela next to go pools had already been distanced by this point and then the attacks started inside the final 30 case and even monomer would all have a go in the lattice case he'd have several ghosts barman dropped with 25 k's to go but working it back on and extending his lead as the new king of the mountains over the final classified climb the descent into potenza would bring four back together enough of a gap by this point to go and win the stage they started attacking each other again the pattern would continue dumoulin dropped off the back we wondered whether we'd see him again but with three kilometers to go that familiar presence back on the front barman attorney being the quickest in the group all day long the moulin kept the pace up yamavisma looking for their first stage win at the jedi in three seasons barman launching the sprint inside the final few hundred meters 13 of a gradient just before the finish line but that didn't put him off he was still the strongest kuhn balman becoming a grand tour stage winner to the only victory he'd ever picked up in professional cycling five years previous at the dauphini the light on his face an embrace with his teammate meanwhile behind leonard kendall would try to force a split be unsuccessful and juanpe lopez would be able to keep the pink jersey five hours 12 minutes of non-stop breathless endlessly entertaining racing barman winning the stage ahead of malima and formula dumoulin would finish in fourth ville la fifth then came the pink jersey group no changes in the top 10 overall trek segafredo and juan pelope is doing a great job a fourth day in the malaya rosa for the young spaniard 38 seconds still his gap ahead of leonard kemner heading into stage eight rin tara maesta is in third at 58 seconds with yates the best of the main contenders in fourth wasn't just about the stage win for kunbalman he pulled on the maya zura the blue jersey as the king of the mountains leading by quite a healthy lead cameron second at 43 points paul's formula and molema have all laid foundations now for a possible later challenge in the race stage eight in napoli starting and leaving in the city it's almost like a mini world championships one big lap before several smaller laps around one climb the peloton then goes back into the city center and a finish in napoli for the first time in a decade 153 kilometers and many worlds anything can happen with lots of people still looking for options and adventures out in the front at the gyro d'italia a reminder you can watch the jitter italia every day live or on demand on gcn plus or discovery plus
